mapper.select: SELECT id AS orderId, order_no AS orderNo, user_id AS userId, status AS status, total_amount AS totalAmount, pay_time AS payTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS orderId, order_no AS orderNo, user_id AS userId, status AS status, total_amount AS totalAmount, pay_time AS payTime, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM tb_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_order SET status = 2 WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status = 0
UPDATE tb_order SET status = 2 WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{beforeTime}
